title: Photos Registry
description: Central registry of photo references. Photos stay local on the user's machine; this file holds metadata and path pointers only. The framework never transmits image data. Supports progress photos, aspirational references, injury documentation, skin/hair changes, and other visual observations.

date.description: ISO date the photo was taken

kind.description: self-progress | aspirational-reference | injury | skin | hair | other

path.description: Relative path within the user folder (e.g., photos/2026-04-16-front.jpg). Null acceptable for aspirational references that are description-only or URL-based.

angle.description: front | side-left | side-right | back | other — for consistent visual comparison across dates

conditions.description: Context: lighting, fasted state, time of day, post-workout, hydration, pose, clothing. Consistency across progress photos enables meaningful comparison.

aspirational_source.description: For kind:aspirational-reference — self-stored file path, URL, public-figure name, or description-only (null path, description in notes)

what_attracts.description: For kind:aspirational-reference — what specifically the user wants to emulate (body composition, specific muscle group, skin quality, posture, face, etc.). Helps distinguish emulation targets from whole-person idolization.

related_plan_id.description: Optional reference to a plan ID in my-data/strategic-plans.json

related_outcome.description: Optional canonical outcome name (e.g., fat-loss, injury-recovery, skin-aesthetics)

related_symptom_id.description: Optional reference to a symptom entry in my-data/symptoms.json

related_visit_id.description: Optional reference to a visit entry in my-data/visit-notes.json
